tool.name: attr_to_leaflet_tool

param.name: input
param.dialogReference: Input Feature Class derived from Tool1: Symbology to Attributes

param.name: fields_names
param.dialogReference: Select the fields to display in feature tooltips in the output Leaflet web map.

param.name: background_option
param.expression: Custom BaseMap | Active Map Background Color
param.dialogReference: Choose the background source for the output map: active map background color or custom basemap layers.

param.name: basemap
param.expression: ESRI streets | ESRI satellite | CARTO dark | CARTO positron | CARTO voyager

param.name: standalone_html
param.dialogReference: If enabled, the web map will be fully self-contained with embedded GeoJSON and can be opened directly in any browser. If disabled, the map will reference an external GeoJSON file for loading data.

param.name: output_folder
param.dialogReference: Specify the output folder for the generated Leaflet web map. The tool writes an index.html file and supporting GeoJSON data to this location.

tool.summary:
The second tool, Attributes to Leaflet, accepts the enriched feature class as input and generates an interactive Leaflet web map. It supports configurable tooltips, basemap selection (active map background color or predefined Esri/CARTO web tile layers), and two output modes: self-contained HTML with embedded GeoJSON or external GeoJSON loading.

The resulting output is a browser-ready Leaflet web map for interactive visualization.
tool.usage: Select the enriched feature class generated by the Symbology to Attributes tool. Configure output settings including tooltip fields, basemap selection, and output mode (self-contained HTML or external GeoJSON). Run the tool to generate an interactive Leaflet web map.

scriptExample.title: Attributes to Leaflet
scriptExample.para: # Run the tool from ArcGIS Pro interface
scriptExample.code: # Run the tool from ArcGIS Pro interface

searchKeys.keyword: Leaflet; Web Mapping; ArcGIS Pro; Python Toolbox; GeoJSON; HTML Export; Feature Layer; Feature Class; Web GIS; Interactive Maps; Basemap; Tooltips; Cartography
